description: Created for the new generation woman, the hugo XX fragrance for women by hugo boss has lychee, black currant and mandarin top notes. Basmati rice and jasmine sambac form the heart with a sandalwood base note.Quantity: 100 ml CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
